events.name: Pest Outbreak!
events.description: Low biodiversity means no natural predators. Monocultures are 3× more vulnerable to pests.

events.name: Drought Conditions
events.description: Water table depletion from flood irrigation reduces groundwater availability.

events.name: Soil Erosion
events.description: Degraded soil absorbs less water and nutrients. Next stage PI deltas reduced by 10%.

events.name: Beneficial Insects Array
events.description: High biodiversity attracts pollinators. Pollinator presence increases crop yield by up to 24%.

events.name: Carbon Credit Awarded
events.description: Farms with verified sustainable practices are eligible for carbon offset programs.
